title: Smoky Croatian Lettuce Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Croatian dish featuring smoky flavors and pillowy soft lettuce, perfect for a solo dinner, made in a cataplana vessel and following ayurvedic tamasic friendly principles.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and add the lettuce, covering the cataplana vessel with a lid.
Simmer, covered, until the lettuce is tender, about 15 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
